notes: Executable local-runtime parity guard for segmentCreate dispatch using a neutral operation name. It is intentionally not Shopify fidelity evidence; live segment validation behavior is covered by the checked-in Shopify fixtures under fixtures/conformance/harry-test-heelo.myshopify.com/2025-01/segments/.
No upstream calls are expected. A runtime that gates segmentCreate on operation-name markers or proxies supported segment mutations upstream will fail the mutation-log target.
